decision.title: Closed memory
decision.nextAction: Keep as historical evidence; do not promote as current without newer evidence.

authority.label: Closed
authority.message: DONE or CLOSED evidence keeps this fact historical

authority.label: Identity
authority.message: stable identity evidence lets agents correlate corrections across time

authority.label: Attachment
authority.message: attachment evidence provides supporting artifact context

authority.label: Stale candidate
authority.message: historical state makes this a stale candidate for current decisions

decision.title: Background memory
decision.nextAction: Use as context only; do not let it drive action by itself.

authority.message: no active task lifecycle; use as background context

authority.message: attachment evidence provides supporting artifact context

decision.title: Current memory
decision.nextAction: Allow this fact into current decisions unless a caller profile narrows scope.
